_meta.description: Café Athena recipe pipeline registry. Tracks stage completion for every recipe and technique folio.

fields.cuisine: Cuisine from ## Category section (e.g. French, Italian, Global)
fields.style: Style from ## Category section (e.g. Classical, Modern, Technique Folio)
fields.family: Subcategory within chapter per Guidance/Taxonomy.md (e.g. Mother Sauce, Pastry Dough)
fields.course: Meal/service position per Taxonomy.md (e.g. Dinner, Dessert, Component). Omitted for Ch. 1–2 technique folios.
fields.dietary: Dietary flags from ## Category section (e.g. Vegetarian, Vegan). null if none.

stages.heroImage: Hero image exists in chapter folder (PNG or WebP)
stages.heroImageOptimized: Hero image converted to WebP via /recipe-hero-image optimize
stages.referenceImagesProcessed: Reference images converted to WebP (null = n/a)
stages.audit: Format audit results tracked per recipe
